message:
refactor: extract withWasmLock helper, fix group parent O(n²)

- layout.ts: extract shared withWasmLock() helper replacing 3 duplicated
  mutex patterns. Make layoutGraphWasmInner sync (all ops are sync).
- sdk.ts: pre-compute childToParent Map for O(1) group parent lookup
  instead of O(n²×m) nested loop with array.includes()
